nasb.text: ‘These things shall be for a statutory ordinance to you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

esv.text: And these things shall be for a statute and rule for you throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.

cnv.text: “‘這在你們一切居住的地方，要作你們世世代代的律例典章。

ccb.text: 这是你们世世代代无论住在哪里都要遵守的律例。
